Name: updateUsers
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (UPDATE "auth"."users" SET "disabled" = $1::bool WHERE users."email" LIKE $2 RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."email" AS "email", mutation_result."disabled" AS "disabled" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
